title: Jean Bell
compiled_truth: Jean Bell is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-10 to 2002-05-13), Jean Bell sent 3 and received 204 emails, totalling 207 interactions. Top correspondents: [Errol Mclaughlin](people/errol-mclaughlin) (2), [Jason Wolfe](people/jason-wolfe) (1), [Janie Aguayo](people/janie-aguayo) (1).
